description: Converts LinkedIn profile data (retrieved from KB) into a professional, ATS-optimized LaTeX resume tailored to a provided Job Description. Maps LinkedIn sections (About, Experience, Education, Skills) into LaTeX environments (ModernCV/Awesome-CV), reorders skills by JD-priority keywords, generates placeholders for missing sections, and ensures all special characters are properly escaped for compilation.

example_response.latex_code: The complete LaTeX source code for the resume
example_response.template_type: The LaTeX template used (ModernCV or Awesome-CV)
